message:
refactor(core): add time/yield primitives to runtime_compat, migrate replay+wezterm tests

Add test-only time control and task yield to runtime_compat:
- time::pause(): pause the runtime clock for deterministic tests
- time::advance(duration): manually advance paused clock
- task::yield_now(): yield to runtime scheduler

Migrate 12 callsites in test modules:
- replay.rs: 3x tokio::time::pause → runtime_compat::time::pause
- wezterm.rs: 3x tokio::select!, 3x tokio::time::advance,
  3x tokio::task::yield_now → runtime_compat equivalents

5 new tests for the added primitives (172 total in runtime_compat).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
